name: 01-tasks-panel-active
evaluate: const s=window.__STORE__;s.dispatch({type:'jobs/addJob',payload:{id:'j1',kind:'scene',label:'beach.mp4'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/updateJob',payload:{id:'j1',progress:0.62,message:'Detecting cut at 37.4s',status:'running'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/addJob',payload:{id:'j2',kind:'warp',label:'Verse'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/updateJob',payload:{id:'j2',progress:0.34,message:'Encoding segment 12/35',status:'running'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/addJob',payload:{id:'j3',kind:'warp',label:'Intro'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/updateJob',payload:{id:'j3',status:'done'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/addJob',payload:{id:'j4',kind:'warp',label:'Outro'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/updateJob',payload:{id:'j4',status:'cancelled'}});for(const t of document.querySelectorAll('.dv-tab')){if((t.textContent||'').trim().startsWith('Tasks')){t.click();break;}}

name: 02-tasks-panel-detail
evaluate: const s=window.__STORE__;s.dispatch({type:'jobs/addJob',payload:{id:'j1',kind:'scene',label:'beach.mp4'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/updateJob',payload:{id:'j1',progress:0.62,message:'Detecting cut at 37.4s',status:'running'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/addJob',payload:{id:'j2',kind:'warp',label:'Verse'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/updateJob',payload:{id:'j2',progress:0.34,message:'Encoding segment 12/35',status:'running'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/addJob',payload:{id:'j3',kind:'warp',label:'Intro'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/updateJob',payload:{id:'j3',status:'done'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/addJob',payload:{id:'j4',kind:'warp',label:'Outro'}});s.dispatch({type:'jobs/updateJob',payload:{id:'j4',status:'cancelled'}});for(const t of document.querySelectorAll('.dv-tab')){if((t.textContent||'').trim().startsWith('Tasks')){t.click();break;}}
